MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Matthew B. Hallinan, General partner of Bally is present. Represented by Matthew Hallinan
Attorney Michael Carrillo Hall appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sean Brown is present.
Attorney Devin S. Brennan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweitzer, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of FEB-06-2012 is vacated.
